_comment: Edit this file to define your Ideal Customer Profile before running the pipeline.

service.name: Weekly Competitive Intelligence Briefing
painPoints: reps getting blindsided by competitor launches or pricing changes on live calls
no one internally owning competitor tracking consistently
objection handling drifting because battlecards are out of date
important competitor moves getting discovered too late to help pipeline
sales leaders wasting time stitching together competitor intel manually
outcomes: a Monday-morning briefing covering the competitor moves your reps actually need to know
trigger alerts when rivals change pricing, launch features, or show negative review trends
clear sales implications your team can use in call prep, objection handling, and outbound
service.founderCredential: Senior engineer with enterprise-grade API governance experience (Scotiabank)
